Petition For Breach Of Trust; Immediate Suspension Of Trustee; Removal Of Trustee; Appointment Of Successor; An Account; Surcharge Of Trustee; Breach
Off Calendar Oct-16-2023 Continued To Jan-22-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PTR-23-306111 The Rosa Jaffe Family Trust and
PTR-23-306188 The Elsbet Gruen Family Trust.

Appearances: Adam Gruen (petitioner) appeared by zoom in propria persona.
Frank Cialone for and with Claude Gruen (respondent).

Mr. Cialone stated that there is no update since filing of the case management statement and asked the court to consolidate the two cases and to set a trial date. Mr. Gruen asked the court to set a trial date and to set a date for a motion to consolidate, and stated that there are procedural issues regarding consolidation that need to be clarified by opposing counsel. Argument was presented as to whether it is appropriate to consolidate the cases for trial purposes only, or for all purposes. The Petition for 1) Breach of Trust, 2) Suspension of Trustee, etc., and the Petition for 1) Breach of Trust, 2) Immediate Suspension of Trustee, etc. are set for trial in the department of the Presiding Judge (206) on January 22, 2024 at 9:30 a.m., (2 orders for the same signed in open court). The parties are to obtain a copy of said orders from the court's website. Mr. Gruen objects to the trial date stating that it does not allow enough time to complete discovery. The court will issue an order consolidating the cases for trial purposes only.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-16-2023 Text Ruling

Petition For Breach Of Trust; Immediate Suspension Of Trustee; Removal Of Trustee; Appointment Of Successor; An Account; Surcharge Of Trustee; Breach
Off Calendar Aug-21-2023 Continued To Oct-16-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PTR-23-306111 The Rosa Jaffe Family Trust and
PTR-23-306188 The Elsbet Gruen Family Trust.

Appearances: Robert Winkler for and with Adam Gruen (in the Rosa Trust).
Kevin O'Brien appeared by zoom for Claude Gruen (trustee).
Adam Gruen in propria persona (in the Elsbet Trust).

Mr. Gruen stated that there has been no conversation regarding resolution, that they are not in a position to mediate, that he was told there are no records of the assets in either trust and that he believes the case should be set for trial with the affirmative defenses decided first. Mr. O'Brien stated that his position is that the petition should be denied, that he believes the statute of limitations and the issue of consent in the Rosa case should be adjudicated first, and that they provided all of the records they have which are roughly 10 years of financial statements from Schwab and tax returns from maybe 2010 or 2013. Mr. Gruen stated that no accountings of the Elsbet Trust have ever been prepared, that there is no starting point from inception to 2010, that there is a gap and that records are missing. The court noted that there are records from 2017 where checks for $94,000.00 were sent to the beneficiaries, and spoke of different forms of accountings, the family dynamics and the distrust between the parties. Further discussion was held regarding the transfers between three accounts, what the funds were used for, the issue of Claude not needing to account, the issue of the contingent remainder beneficiaries not being entitled to get accountings, discovery still needing to be conducted, the need for preference in trial setting, the court's authority under Breslin to order the parties to mediation, etc. The court informed the parties that it will issue a case management order. The Petitions for Breach of Trust, etc. (2) are continued to October 16, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept, 204. Case management conference hearings are also set for October 16, 2023.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.
